items.title: Honda's affordable EV hot hatch is 'selling like hotcakes,' priced at $21,000
items.summary: Starting at about $21,000, Honda said the electric hot hatch is already exceeding expectations with over 7,000 preorders.

items.title: Should I Use the Manufacturer iBeacon SDKs?
